verses.text: Woe to them 'at ease in Zion,' trusting in Samaria, who 'put far away the evil day.' False security. To dismiss coming judgment is the folly of the comfortable.
Woe to them 'at ease in Zion,' trusting in Samaria, who 'put far away the evil day.' False security. To dismiss coming judgment is the folly of the comfortable.
Woe to them 'at ease in Zion,' trusting in Samaria, who 'put far away the evil day.' False security. To dismiss coming judgment is the folly of the comfortable.
They lie on ivory beds, feast, and sing, 'but they are not grieved for the affliction of Joseph.' Heartless luxury. Indulgence that ignores others' ruin is a grievous sin.
They lie on ivory beds, feast, and sing, 'but they are not grieved for the affliction of Joseph.' Heartless luxury. Indulgence that ignores others' ruin is a grievous sin.
They lie on ivory beds, feast, and sing, 'but they are not grieved for the affliction of Joseph.' Heartless luxury. Indulgence that ignores others' ruin is a grievous sin.
Therefore they shall go captive first; the LORD 'abhorreth the excellency of Jacob' and his palaces. Pride loathed. God despises the splendour built on injustice.
Therefore they shall go captive first; the LORD 'abhorreth the excellency of Jacob' and his palaces. Pride loathed. God despises the splendour built on injustice.
If ten remain in a house, they shall die; the LORD smites great house and small alike. No exemption. Judgment levels the mighty and the lowly together.
If ten remain in a house, they shall die; the LORD smites great house and small alike. No exemption. Judgment levels the mighty and the lowly together.
If ten remain in a house, they shall die; the LORD smites great house and small alike. No exemption. Judgment levels the mighty and the lowly together.
Do horses run on rock? Yet they turn 'judgment into gall' and boast in nothing; God will raise a nation to afflict them. Absurd injustice. Perverting justice is as senseless as plowing the sea.
